initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
LEFT JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE e.ID IS NULL 
   OR e.Examination Date IS NULL 
   OR (strftime('%Y', e.Examination Date) - strftime('%Y', p.First Date) > 1)
   OR (strftime('%Y', e.Examination Date) - strftime('%Y', p.First Date) = 1 
       AND (strftime('%m', e.Examination Date) > strftime('%m', p.First Date)
            OR (strftime('%m', e.Examination Date) = strftime('%m', p.First Date)
                AND strftime('%d', e.Examination Date) >= strftime('%d', p.First Date)));

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
LEFT JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE e.ID IS NULL 
   OR e.Examination Date IS NULL 
   OR (strftime('%Y', e.Examination Date) - strftime('%Y', p.First Date) > 1)
   OR (strftime('%Y', e.Examination Date) - strftime('%Y', p.First Date) = 1 
       AND (strftime('%m', e.Examination Date) > strftime('%m', p.First Date 
       OR (strftime('%m', e.Examination Date) = strftime('%m', p.First Date) 
           AND strftime('%d', e.Examination Date) >= strftime('%d', p.First Date)))))

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Patient.ID) 
FROM Patient 
LEFT JOIN Examination ON Patient.ID = Examination.ID 
WHERE Examination.ID IS NULL 
   OR strftime('%Y', Examination.Examination Date) - strftime('%Y', Patient.First Date) > 1 
   OR (strftime('%Y', Examination.Examination Date) - strftime('%Y', Patient.First Date) = 1 
       AND (strftime('%m', Examination.Examination Date) > strftime('%m', Patient.First Date) 
            OR (strftime('%m', Examination.Examination Date) = strftime('%m', Patient.First Date) 
                AND strftime('%d', Examination.Examination Date) >= strftime('%d', Patient.First Date))));

FROM Patient p

   OR (strftime('%Y', e.Examination Date) - strftime('%Y', p.First Date) = 1 
       AND (strftime('%m', e.Examination Date) > strftime('%m', p.First Date)
            OR (strftime('%m', e.Examination Date) = strftime('%m', p.First Date)
                AND strftime('%d', e.Examination Date) >= strftime('%d', p.First Date)));

candidates.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
LEFT JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE e.ID IS NULL 
   OR e.[Examination Date] IS NULL 
   OR (strftime('%Y', e.[Examination Date]) - strftime('%Y', p.First Date) > 1)
   OR (strftime('%Y', e.[Examination Date]) - strftime('%Y', p.First Date) = 1 
       AND (strftime('%m', e.[Examination Date]) > strftime('%m', p.First Date)
            OR (strftime('%m', e.[Examination Date]) = strftime('%m', p.First Date)
                AND strftime('%d', e.[Examination Date]) >= strftime('%d', p.First Date)));

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
LEFT JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE e.ID IS NULL 
   OR e.[Examination Date] IS NULL 
   OR (strftime('%Y', e.[Examination Date]) - strftime('%Y', p.First Date) > 1)
   OR (strftime('%Y', e.[Examination Date]) - strftime('%Y', p.First Date) = 1 
       AND (strftime('%m', e.[Examination Date]) > strftime('%m', p.First Date)
            OR (strftime('%m', e.[Examination Date]) = strftime('%m', p.First Date)
                AND strftime('%d', e.[Examination Date]) >= strftime('%d', p.First Date)));
